calendar.matters:
Perition For Instruction
Off Calendar May-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Reed for Co-Executor: Lawrence Lanctot; John Schaller appeared by Court Call for Co-Trustee: Helen Swanson.

The Court noted that there were no objections filed and pregranted items 6, 7 and 8 of the Order. Mr. Schaller noted that he had not taken possession of the art work. On the record, counsel agreed to items 6(a), 7(c) and 8(a) of the Proposed Order. Mr. Reed will prepare a revised Order for signature.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
